response.justification: Bogdan brings 30+ years of engineering experience with credible distributed systems and high-throughput credentials (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby at millions of HTTP req/sec), Staff-level tenure at multiple companies, and genuine AI-adjacent work including MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, Python — a stated must-have — is entirely absent from his skills list and employment history, which is a material gap. His TypeScript background is solid and his systems breadth is compelling, but the Python absence and relatively thin AI-native depth make this a borderline case worth a short screening call to assess Python exposure and the actual scope of his agentic systems work.
strengths: Proven high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP req/sec with low-latency async I/O
Active involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator tooling at re:cinq, showing real exposure to agentic engineering environments
Long Staff-level IC career with technical breadth across full-stack, embedded, DevOps, and infrastructure domains
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills and all employment history despite being a stated must-have technical requirement
AI-native experience is described in general terms without concrete evidence of LLM system design, ML pipelines, or AI product delivery at scale
No explicit evidence of driving technical strategy across stakeholders or coordinating at the organizational scope expected at Staff level
